config.note: clarify group-scene new-voice rule after s63_b35 verification

results.promptLabel: v2 grounded cut (time jump, fight energy, subject reframe)
results.note: From extend blind: baseline and v1 nearly agree; v2 targets mid-scene fight energy and new-subject scrambles baseline misses. Updated 2026-07-22: 3/4 models (grok-4.5, claude-sonnet-5, claude-fable-5) flipped s63_b35 ('a deep soft voice-the ELEPHANT of the gun-team') to hard_cut, over-applying the new-subject rule to a new voice joining an already-established group scene (verified against screenplay.fountain: this is one line in an ongoing multi-animal dialogue circle, same_location=true, prev also a speaker cue). Added a clarifying extend rule for that case; new-subject hard_cut now requires actual physical entrance/blocking, not just descriptive color on a voice.

samples.visual: From habit the Pack answers. Lame wolves, shot-wounded wolves, mangy wolves-many missing-drag themselves to the Rock. They stare at the striped hide, huge claws dangling from empty feet. Mowgli leaps …
Bushes rustle. Father Wolf drops on his haunches, ready to leap-then checks in mid-spring, shoots straight up four or five feet, and lands almost where he left ground.
Big Toomai speaks.
Kotick swims thousands of miles-year after year-searching. He asks sea birds, sharks, walruses. He visits beaches from California to Japan. Everywhere: seals, and the shadow of the sealers.
NARRATOR-a lean Englishman in shirt-sleeves, period moustache-jams on boots and waterproof. Vixen bolts out the other side.
Mud and drizzle. Heel-ropes snap. A mob of Afghan horses stampede through the dark between tent ropes. Camels break loose, blunder, fall over guy-lines. Men shout. Canvas heaves.
Baloo and Bagheera burst from the jungle. Monkeys scream and fling themselves upon them. Bagheera fights toward the tank; Baloo stands like a rock under a rain of biting, scratching bodies.

Year upon year, more seals leave Novastoshnah, Lukannon, and the other nurseries for the quiet sheltered beaches. Kotick sits all the summer through, getting bigger and fatter and stronger, while the …
Big Toomai speaks.

He has no time to change his mind. Kotick's head is out; teeth sink in the blubber of the young seal's neck. Kotick throws himself back on his haunches, hauls his enemy down the beach, shakes him, kno…
Toomai's Mother speaks.
Teddy's Father picks the mongoose up between finger and thumb.
Baloo speaks.
From the dark, a deep soft voice-the ELEPHANT of the gun-team, huge beyond the gun-wheels.
Father Wolf speaks.
Rain sheets down on a vast military camp-thirty thousand men, camels, elephants, horses, bullocks, and mules gathered for review. Mud roads, tent lines, gun parks. Flags hang heavy and wet.
Baloo speaks.
Mother Wolf speaks.
Father Wolf at the mouth. Mother Wolf lifts her head.
Mowgli, bare and scarred, jogs steadily along a rough road down the valley-twenty miles of dust and heat.
Toomai's Mother speaks.

Ruined city swallowed by jungle: broken domes, terraces, a great reservoir tank, marble summerhouse with pierced screen-work. Bandar-log pour over walls with Mowgli, chattering of kings and laws they …
Bagheera speaks.
Mowgli (scornfully).
